headline: NVIDIA, Marriott, and PCA Just Delivered Big News for Income Investors
summary: See where NVIDIA's dividend yield sits after a 25x dividend boost; one of the largest investors will ever see. Two other industry leaders also lifted payouts.

headline: Is Marriott International Stock Outperforming the Nasdaq?
summary: Marriott International has rallied the Nasdaq Composite over the past year, and analysts remain moderately bullish about the stock’s outlook.
